pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 102, 111, 120: Three activities created with exact summaries

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task involves reassigning 3 pending activities (Contract Negotiation, Pricing Update, Prepare Demo) from the salesperson 'Ellis Absent' to 'Sam Cover' in an Odoo CRM system. The data is synthetic and generated dynamically during task setup via Odoo's XML-RPC API. All activity summaries and user names match the metadata exactly.
